name: seed
description: Shape rough ideas into reviewed specs, decisions, and handoff plans before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into reviewed specs
interface.longDescription: Use Seed before implementation to clarify intent, compare approaches, write a reviewed spec or decision artifact, optionally prepare a compact Writing Plan for complex handoff, and stop before coding starts.
defaultPrompt: Help me think through this idea before coding.
Turn this rough feature idea into a reviewed spec.
Help me choose a direction and write a handoff plan.
